title: update-demo-scripts-docs-and-deck
summary: Verified, live-tested, and committed the already-drafted JWT/OIDC rewrite of README.md, PODMAN_MIGRATION.md, three docs/ design/audit files, presenterm/vso.md, and vso-demo.sh, plus two new static test suites guarding against stale TokenReview-as-default language and deck structural regressions.
keyLearnings: - All task-10 deliverables were already fully drafted (uncommitted) in the working tree when this run started, from a prior interrupted attempt — verification-first approach (read everything, run all tests, live-verify) was correct rather than re-authoring from scratch.

- Doc taxonomy established: "customer-facing" docs (README.md, PODMAN_MIGRATION.md, vso-demo.sh, presenterm/vso.md) must present JWT/OIDC as default with legacy TokenReview mentions only in explicitly-framed comparison context; "historical/internal" docs (the 3 docs/vso-*.md design/audit files) may keep old narrative in-body but need a prominent "Superseded on auth method" callout near the top linking to vso-jwt-oidc-auth-plan.md.

- The unrelated top-level Agent Injector/OTel README section legitimately still uses TokenReview as its own actual (non-VSO) auth method — this is correctly exempted by the doc test's heuristic (only flags TokenReview lines that also mention vso/jwt-vso/jwt-oidc).

- New test files are strictly static (bash -n, grep/awk checks) and never invoke presenterm, per the hard PTY-hang guardrail; test-vso-deck-validation.sh only does `command -v presenterm` for an informational version string.

- Live end-to-end proof against the real two-cluster kind lab: `make verify-two-cluster` (7/7 sections) and a full non-interactive `vso-demo.sh` run both pass, including wrong-audience and wrong-service-account JWT rejection and rotation-then-restore-to-`larry`; re-verified cleanliness after the demo run.
- Live presenterm Ctrl-E validation of `make vso-deck` is explicitly out of scope for task 10 and deferred to task 11's tmux-backed validator.
blockers: none — all task 10 acceptance/validation criteria met; 15/15 scripts/tests/test-*.sh suites pass; live two-cluster verification green before and after the demo run.
